criteria_results.criterion: VALIDATION = real checks per DEC-0018: build/check/test exit codes; 5 runtime demos; adversarial probe
criteria_results.evidence: Build exit 0; check exit 0 (after one biome auto-format pass at ccad130 — formatting-only, zero behavioral change, documented in commit body); pi-agent-dispatch test 59/59. Runtime demos (14/14 PASS): D1.a/b schema + amendConfigEntry; D2.a-f per-KIND library bounds enforcement; D3.a/b composite-loader dynamic registration + forbidden refusal; D4.a-d author-tool-grant writer.kind=human enforcement + forbidden-wholesale refusal. Per-KIND CLI runtime demo: all 4 CLIs successfully invoked against real fixtures with structured JSON output. Adversarial probe (fresh-context Explore): 10/10 PASS with zero false-pass scenarios — L1+L2 invariant clean, L3 guard cannot be bypassed, author-tool-grant gates fire pre-mutation, composite-loader refuses pre-registration, per-KIND triple symmetric, zero forbidden-term hits in code OR commit messages, zero sibling-consumer imports, schema parity in both config.schema.json locations, all 5 static tools registered unconditionally.

evidence: TASK-092 FEAT-010 (Hybrid 3 v2 composite-tool infrastructure) landed on branch feat-010-composite-tools. 18 commits total: 2 Phase 1 substrate (a166c36 + c1d1f21 enacting DEC-0052 + filing TASK-092 + SHA-resolve), 14 implementation commits (4e722f0..605b507 across 8 step-groups), 1 biome format commit (ccad130, formatting-only zero behavioral change documented in body), 1 Phase 4 cascade (this commit pending). Three verification layers all green: build/check/test (59/59 pi-agent-dispatch tests pass + workspace gates), 4 runtime demos (D1-D4) totaling 14/14 PASS + per-KIND CLI demo (4/4 PASS), adversarial probe 10/10 PASS with zero false-pass scenarios + zero forbidden-term hits. Implements FEAT-005 capability composition at bounded-composite granularity (the JI-023 form: 'A bash command. Not bash.' + 'There can be a registry of them'). Closes FGAP-116 (operation-granular capability vocabulary gap). NOTE on substrate config drift: runtime demo D1.b add/remove against tool_operations_forbidden left an empty 'tool_operations_forbidden': [] seed in .project/config.json — committed as canonical post-install state matching samples/conception.json. Subagent deviations (documented in commit bodies): (a) STEP 6 committed before STEP 5 to avoid transient broken-import commit; (b) ToolOperationDecl extension folded into composite-loader commit rather than schema-extension commit (lands with its first consumer); (c) assertDefaultsClean exported with optional defaults arg for test parameterization. All deviations canon-aligned.
